scripts.release: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm -r publish
scripts.test:compiler: pnpm compiler build ./examples/math.wasm.ts && pnpm compiler build ./examples/stdlib_test.wasm.ts
scripts.test:linker: pnpm linker build -o out/math-app ./wasm-out/math.wasm && pnpm linker build -o out/stdlib_test-app ./wasm-out/stdlib_test.wasm
scripts.test: pnpm test:compiler && pnpm test:linker && pnpm test:exec
